rationale: Control case per answer key (group=control, no scheme/genre). dim1: output's misstatement_probability=15 <=30, so band score 2. dim2: null (control). dim3: nulls (control); note mechanism_hypotheses is empty, appropriately so given p<40. dim4: risk_tier='clear' is consistent with p=15 (<40 => clear/watch), so no cap. Evidence cites concrete provided data points with values and dates: CL1 pairs AR (66,239K in 2012 vs 59,385K in 2011; 69,199K in 2016 vs 70,597K in 2015) against revenue trends; CL3 explains OCF>>NI (133,566K vs 33,464K in 2016) via the 82,445K depreciation add-back; CL6 tracks allowance 475K->305K->275K (2014-2016) vs revenue; CL5 contrasts quarterly NI smoothness with annual NI variability; CL7 documents consistent 10-K filing cadence 2012-2017 with no NT/amendments. The top_signals coherently combine these multi-year, multi-point observations and correctly size minor anomalies (OtherAssetsNoncurrent 0.6M->3.4M; allowance decline) against ~$650M assets/~$670M revenue, supporting the low-risk conclusion. This meets dim4=3 (specific, supportive, coherent multi-year combination). memorization_suspect_condition2=false: the reasoning points at concrete provided data content throughout (not bare document lists) and mentions no post-cutoff facts (no revelation/enforcement/outcome), as expected for a control case.
